mapper.sql: tpis.plan_implement_id, tpis.people_assessed_total, tpis.one_time_pass_total, tpis.primary_pass_rate, tpis.make_examination_number, tpis.make_pass_rate, tpis.id, tpis.enabled_flag, tpis.check_method, tpis.update_time, tpis.create_by, tpis.create_time, tpis.update_by

${tAlias}.plan_implement_id as ${tAlias}_plan_implement_id, ${tAlias}.people_assessed_total as ${tAlias}_people_assessed_total, ${tAlias}.one_time_pass_total as ${tAlias}_one_time_pass_total, ${tAlias}.primary_pass_rate as ${tAlias}_primary_pass_rate, ${tAlias}.make_examination_number as ${tAlias}_make_examination_number, ${tAlias}.make_pass_rate as ${tAlias}_make_pass_rate, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.check_method as ${tAlias}_check_method, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_inspection_situation (plan_implement_id, people_assessed_total, one_time_pass_total, primary_pass_rate, make_examination_number, make_pass_rate, enabled_flag, check_method, update_time, create_by, create_time, update_by) values (#{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{peopleAssessedTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oneTimePassTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{primaryPassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{makeExaminationNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{makePassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{checkMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_inspection_situation set plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, people_assessed_total = #{peopleAssessedTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, one_time_pass_total = #{oneTimePassTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, primary_pass_rate = #{primaryPassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, make_examination_number = #{makeExaminationNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, make_pass_rate = #{makePassRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, check_method = #{checkMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
